calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion
Off Calendar Oct-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Harry L. Jacobs; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:39 am and concluding at 9:43 am.

Plaintiff Westlake Services LLC. is represented by Sunny Lee, Esq. via zoom video conference.
Defendant Edilsar Vasquez Ramirez is not present.

MARIBEL ALVIZAR is sworn to testify on behalf of the plaintiff and testifies.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Westlake Services LLC, and against Defendant Edilsar Vasquez Ramirez, as follows:

1. Damages: $26,590.15
2. Costs $566.00

Total Judgment: $27,156.15

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)
